message.content: {"items":[{"title":"German Longitudinal Election Study (GLES), Rolling Cross-Section Campaign Survey 2013 (GLES 2013)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.11913","justification":"Includes data on German federal election campaigning, parties, political attitudes and behavior in 2013, directly reflecting the political system and party competition in Germany in the 2010s."},{"title":"German Longitudinal Election Study (GLES), Campaign Panel 2017","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.12938","justification":"Panel survey around the 2017 Bundestag election analyzing voter behavior, party evaluations, and perceptions of political institutions, focusing on Germany’s political system in the late 2010s."},{"title":"Politbarometer West 2010","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.11034","justification":"Part of the long-running Politbarometer series; monthly surveys in 2010 on party support, trust in political institutions, and evaluations of government and opposition in Germany."},{"title":"Politbarometer 2013","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.11818","justification":"Covers public opinion on German federal politics, parties, government performance, and political institutions during the 2013 election year."},{"title":"Politbarometer 2017","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.12940","justification":"Provides time-series survey data on party preferences, government approval, and opinions about political actors and institutions in Germany in 2017."},{"title":"European Election Study 2014 – Voter Study, Germany","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.12005","justification":"Contains German respondents’ views on parties, European and national institutions, and political representation during the 2014 European Parliament election."},{"title":"German General Social Survey (ALLBUS) 2010","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.11039","justification":"Nationally representative survey including modules on political interest, trust in institutions, evaluations of democracy, and attitudes toward government in 2010."},{"title":"German General Social Survey (ALLBUS) 2014","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.12171","justification":"Covers political attitudes, party identification, and trust in political institutions in Germany mid‑2010s."},{"title":"German General Social Survey (ALLBUS) 2018","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.13249","justification":"Includes extensive information on political opinions, party ties, and views of governmental institutions in Germany at the end of the 2010s."},{"title":"German Federal Election 2013 – Post-election Cross Section (GLES 2013)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.11914","justification":"Post-election survey capturing voter evaluations of parties, government, and democratic institutions in Germany after the 2013 Bundestag election."}]}
